Localization.Description: Permissions to create RDP connections are applied

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The operating system settings allowing RDP access are modified on host {event_src.host}. The value of the parameter "{object.name}" in the registry key "{object.path}" is changed to {object.new_value}.
The user {subject.account.name} allowed remote RDP access to the system on host {event_src.host} by executing the command
